blockers: parser_validated=false; non-blocking for GitHub/SSRN because MMLU-Pro raw-output claims are diagnostic only
mmlu_pro_confirmatory=false; non-blocking for GitHub/SSRN because WILD carries the core claim
data_output_license: CC-BY-4.0 for derived aggregate outputs; source datasets remain under their original terms
expected_runtime: analysis regeneration: minutes; WILD ingest depends on download/cache; CPU rerun optional
paper_wording_rule: Use GitHub/SSRN public-release wording when github_public_ready=true. Do not present MMLU-Pro raw-output accounting as confirmatory until parser validation and robustness gates pass.
